texto: As computers have become more powerful, computer graphics have advanced to the point where it's possible to create photo-realistic images. The bottleneck wasn't, 'How do we make pixels prettier?' It was, 'How do we engage with them more?'
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jefferson Han que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “As computers have become more powerful, computer graphics have advanced to the point where it's p…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, powerful, create, com foco em create e point.
